mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.price AS price, deal_stat.sale_price AS salePrice, NVL(deal_stat.discount_rate, 0) AS discountRate, p.view_count AS viewCount, NVL(purchase_stat.total_quantity, 0) AS totalQuantity, pp.picture_saved_location AS pictureLocation, CASE WHEN favorite_stat.product_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS favorite
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
ORDER BY NVL(deal_stat.sale_price, p.price) ASC, p.id ASC
ORDER BY NVL(deal_stat.sale_price, p.price) DESC, p.id ASC
ORDER BY NVL(purchase_stat.total_quantity, 0) DESC, p.view_count DESC, p.id ASC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
